mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO rpt_asset_daily ( stat_date, project_id, building_id, floor_id, format_type, total_shops, rented_shops, vacant_shops, decorating_shops, opened_shops, total_area, rented_area, vacant_area, decoration_area, vacancy_rate, rental_rate, opening_rate, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, is_deleted ) VALUES
( #{r.statDate}, #{r.projectId}, COALESCE(#{r.buildingId}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.floorId}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.formatType}, ''), COALESCE(#{r.totalShops}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.rentedShops}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.vacantShops}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.decoratingShops}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.openedShops}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.totalArea}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.rentedArea}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.vacantArea}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.decorationArea}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.vacancyRate}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.rentalRate}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.openingRate}, 0), 0, NOW(), 0, NOW(), 0 )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_shops = VALUES(total_shops), rented_shops = VALUES(rented_shops), vacant_shops = VALUES(vacant_shops), decorating_shops = VALUES(decorating_shops), opened_shops = VALUES(opened_shops), total_area = VALUES(total_area), rented_area = VALUES(rented_area), vacant_area = VALUES(vacant_area), decoration_area = VALUES(decoration_area), vacancy_rate = VALUES(vacancy_rate), rental_rate = VALUES(rental_rate), opening_rate = VALUES(opening_rate), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(stat_date) FROM rpt_asset_daily WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND project_id = #{projectId}

SELECT * FROM rpt_asset_daily WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND stat_date = #{statDate} AND building_id = 0 AND floor_id = 0 AND format_type = '' AND project_id = #{projectId}
ORDER BY project_id

SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(stat_date, '%Y-%u')
DATE_FORMAT(stat_date, '%Y-%m')
CAST(YEAR(stat_date) AS CHAR)
DATE_FORMAT(stat_date, '%Y-%m-%d')
AS timeDim,
AVG(rental_rate) AVG(opening_rate) AVG(vacancy_rate)
AS value, SUM(total_shops) AS totalShops, SUM(rented_shops) AS rentedShops, SUM(total_area) AS totalArea, SUM(rented_area) AS rentedArea FROM rpt_asset_daily WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND building_id = 0 AND floor_id = 0 AND format_type = '' AND project_id = #{projectId} AND building_id = #{buildingId} AND floor_id = #{floorId} AND format_type = #{formatType} AND stat_date >= #{startDate} AND stat_date <= #{endDate}
GROUP BY
DATE_FORMAT(stat_date, '%Y-%u') DATE_FORMAT(stat_date, '%Y-%m') YEAR(stat_date) DATE_FORMAT(stat_date, '%Y-%m-%d')
ORDER BY timeDim ASC

SELECT format_type AS formatType, SUM(total_shops) AS totalShops, SUM(rented_shops) AS rentedShops, SUM(vacant_shops) AS vacantShops, SUM(opened_shops) AS openedShops, SUM(total_area) AS totalArea, SUM(rented_area) AS rentedArea, /* 出租率 = 已租面积 / 总面积（防除零）*/ CASE WHEN SUM(total_area) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(rented_area) / SUM(total_area) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS rentalRate, /* 空置率 = 空置面积 / 总面积 */ CASE WHEN SUM(total_area) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(vacant_area) / SUM(total_area) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS vacancyRate FROM rpt_asset_daily WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND stat_date = #{statDate} AND floor_id = 0 AND building_id = 0 AND format_type != '' /* 仅取业态维度行，排除全业态汇总 */ AND project_id = #{projectId}
GROUP BY format_type ORDER BY SUM(total_shops) DESC

SELECT project_id AS projectId, SUM(total_shops) AS totalShops, SUM(rented_shops) AS rentedShops, SUM(vacant_shops) AS vacantShops, SUM(opened_shops) AS openedShops, SUM(total_area) AS totalArea, SUM(rented_area) AS rentedArea, SUM(vacant_area) AS vacantArea, /* 各项目均值（项目级聚合行已是加权平均，直接取即可）*/ AVG(vacancy_rate) AS vacancyRate, AVG(rental_rate) AS rentalRate, AVG(opening_rate) AS openingRate FROM rpt_asset_daily WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND stat_date = #{statDate} AND building_id = 0 AND floor_id = 0 AND format_type = ''
GROUP BY project_id ORDER BY rental_rate DESC

SELECT project_id AS projectId, SUM(total_area) AS totalArea, SUM(rented_area) AS rentedArea, SUM(vacant_area) AS vacantArea, SUM(decoration_area) AS decorationArea, CASE WHEN SUM(total_area) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(rented_area) / SUM(total_area) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS rentalRate, CASE WHEN SUM(total_area) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(vacant_area) / SUM(total_area) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS vacancyRate FROM rpt_asset_daily WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND stat_date = #{statDate} AND building_id = 0 AND floor_id = 0 AND format_type = ''
GROUP BY project_id ORDER BY total_area DESC
